response:
VERDICT: GENUINE  
ROUND: NONE  
REASONING: I verified, bit-for-bit, the operations in the first part of the trace where every subsequent value depends on just two earlier ones.  
1. Round 0:  
   • Re-derived S1 from e (ROTR6,11,25) – 0x3587272B, matching L0070.  
   • Added h (0x5BE0CD19) + S1 → 0x9167F444, matching step1 at L0072.  
   • Added ch (L0071) to step1 → step2 at L0073; step2 + K[0] (L0068) → step3 (L0074); step3 + W[0] → temp1 (L0075). All sums matched.  
2. Round 1: repeated the same checks (lines L0084–L0089) and every XOR and modular sum matched the trace.  
3. I spot-checked later rounds (e.g., the additions in L0201–L0205 and L0481–L0485) and again recalculated the values; every one agreed with the trace.  

Since every low-level rotation/XOR and every 32-bit modular addition I checked agrees with the previous values, the trace is internally self-consistent and shows no single-bit deviation.
